task_objective: Restore QAM typography regression by setting field labels to 12px and forcing status values/messages and versions list to 11px using CSS child selectors and !important overrides.
design_decisions: Set CompactFieldLabel to 12px for Status: and Last Operation: field labels to keep them legible but compact.
Forced status value, last operation row (and child span/div elements), and versions list content to 11px font-size using CSS child selectors with !important to prevent Decky Loader theme overrides.
results: All python unit tests passed, Ruff check/format passed, ty typecheck passed, and frontend builds completed successfully.
